notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro CBEBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/CBEBankParser.kt). Commercial Bank of Ethiopia sends "Dear [Name] your Account 1*********9388 has been Credited/debited with ETB ..." narratives, transfer summaries with S.charge/VAT lines and a "with a total of ETB" amount, and a trailing "Your Current Balance is ETB ..." plus an apps.cbe.com.et receipt URL whose `id=` query parameter carries the FT transaction reference.

requireAnyKeyword: thank you for banking with cbe

fixtures.name: credit with masked source and ref
fixtures.body: Dear [Name] your Account 1*********9388 has been Credited with ETB 3,000.00 from Be, on 13/09/2025 at 12:37:24 with Ref No ********* Your Current Balance is ETB 3,104.87. Thank you for Banking with CBE!

fixtures.name: debit with receipt url reference
fixtures.body: Dear [Name] your Account 1*********9388 has been debited with ETB 25.00. Your Current Balance is ETB 3,079.87 Thank you for Banking with CBE! https://apps.cbe.com.et:100/?id=FT25256RP1FK27799388

fixtures.name: transfer with fee summary and whole-birr total
fixtures.body: Dear [Name], You have transfered ETB 250.00 to Sender on 14/09/2025 at 12:28:56 from your account 1*********9388. Your account has been debited with a S.charge of ETB 0 and  15% VAT of ETB0.00, with a total of ETB250. Your Current Balance is ETB 2,829.87. Thank you for Banking with CBE!

fixtures.name: alternative sender credit with named ref
fixtures.body: Dear Customer your Account 1*********1234 has been Credited with ETB 5,000.00 from Salary Payment, on 15/09/2025 at 09:00:00 with Ref No ABC123456 Your Current Balance is ETB 8,000.00. Thank you for Banking with CBE!

fixtures.name: transfer to named recipient with total and url
fixtures.body: Dear Name, You have transfered ETB 5,000.00 to Ali Mohamud on 17/03/2026 at 10:52:06 from your account 1*********2222. Your account has been debited with a S.charge of ETB 10.00 and VAT(15%) of ETB1.50 and Disaster Fund (5%) of ETB0.50, with a total of ETB 5012.00. Your Current Balance is ETB 4,183.14. Thank you for Banking with CBE! https://apps.cbe.com.et:100/?id=FT26076N2J9G74602222 For feedback click the link https://forms.gle/R1s9nkJ6qZVCxRVu9

fixtures.name: service charge debit with total
fixtures.body: Dear Name your Account 1*********2222 has been debited with ETB10,000.00. Service charge of  ETB 10.00 and VAT(15%) of ETB1.50 and Disaster Fund (5%) of ETB0.50 with a total of ETB 10012.00. Your Current Balance is ETB 10,215.54. Thank you for Banking with CBE! https://apps.cbe.com.et:100/?id=FT260708LN6D7462222

fixtures.name: promotional message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, enjoy a 20% discount offer when you shop with CBE Birr this holiday season. Visit your nearest branch today!
